title: T-042 — Scanner FEFO suggest endpoint
prompt:
# T-042 — Scanner FEFO suggest endpoint

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §13.5 (FR-WH-028).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`POST /api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp` returning top-5 ranked LP suggestions per fefo_strategy_v1.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/route.ts`. Body: {wo_id, wo_material_id, qty_needed, warehouse_id}. Delegate to T-030 with limit 5. Validate session token (T-041). Tenant RLS.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid request with 10 candidate LPs, when endpoint is hit, then exactly 5 ranked suggestions return.
2. Given an invalid session token, when endpoint is hit, then 401 returns per V-WH-SCAN-001.
3. Given the WO is in DRAFT status, when endpoint is hit, then 422 returns with explanation that WO must be RELEASED/IN_PROGRESS.

## Test strategy
- RED: route.test.ts covers ranking, auth failure, WO status guard.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test suggest-lp`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not return >5 rows.
- Do not bypass scanner session validation.
- Do not include LPs with disallowed qa_status.

pipeline_inputs.description: Top-5 FEFO suggestion endpoint for Scanner.
pipeline_inputs.details: Delegates to T-030; session validation via T-041 token.
acceptance_criteria: Given 10 candidate LPs, when endpoint is hit, then exactly 5 ranked suggestions return
Given an invalid session token, when endpoint is hit, then 401 returns per V-WH-SCAN-001
Given the WO is DRAFT, when endpoint is hit, then 422 returns explaining WO status guard
test_strategy: RED: route.test.ts covers ranking, auth failure, WO status
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass scanner session validation
